item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Turkey cuvette with a juicy centre, served with roasted potatoes, slow bakedtomatoes and creamy white tarragon sauce, topped with fresh pea shoots.Cranberry sauce on the side (6+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Tonkatsu, panko breaded Asian spiced pork cutlet with a crisp crust, servedwith tonkatsu sauce, rice and finely shredded cabbage. Creamy goma dressing andpickled ginger on the side (1+2+7+8+11+13+15) GREEN DISH: dish Portobello katsu with crispy panko coating and Asian spices, served withtonkatsu sauce, rice and fresh cabbage. Goma dressing and pickled ginger on theside

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Penne pasta with sun dried tomatoes and chicken in a tangy creamy feta sauce,tossed with fresh herbs including basil, oregano and parsley, finished withroasted hazelnuts (1+6+9+15) GREEN DISH: dish Penne pasta with sun dried tomatoes and butter beans in a creamy feta sauce,tossed with basil, oregano, parsley and roasted hazelnuts

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Swedish sausage stew with potatoes simmered in rich tomato sauce and sausages,topped with fresh herb salad and crisp cabbage (1+6+13+15) GREEN DISH: dish Slow cooked stew with potatoes, beans and tomato, topped with herb salad andfresh cabbage (13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Chicken Danoise with roasted chicken, potatoes and rich brown gravy, toppedwith peas tossed in cold pressed rapeseed oil and parsley. Pickled cucumbersalad and rhubarb compote on the side (6) GREEN DISH: dish Roasted pea protein with potatoes and brown gravy, topped with peas, rapeseedoil and parsley. Pickled cucumber salad and rhubarb compote on the side
